zh.Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, England: 英國哈普爾易欽 阿巴斯
zh.Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭戴文素可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Gifford於大約1428年出生在英國哈普爾易欽 阿巴斯時，他的父親John Gifford24歲，母親Alice Ugworthy30歲。他與Joan Spencer結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年4月13日在英國戴文素可姆享年56歲。

zh-hans.Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, England: 英国哈普爾易欽 阿巴斯
zh-hans.Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰戴文素可姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Gifford于大约1428年出生在英国哈普爾易欽 阿巴斯时，他的父亲John Gifford24岁，母亲Alice Ugworthy30岁。他与Joan Spencer结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年4月13日在英国戴文素可姆享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Gifford was born about 1428, in Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, England, his father, John Gifford, was 24 and his mother, Alice Ugworthy, was 30. He married Joan Spencer. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 13 April 1483, in Sutcombe, Devon, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen Gifford est né environ 1428, à Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, John Gifford, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Ugworthy, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joan Spencer. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 13 avril 1483, à Sutcombe, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen Gifford um 1428 in Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Gifford 24 und seine Mutter Alice Ugworthy 30. Er hat Joan Spencer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. April 1483 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Sutcombe, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Gifford è nato il circa 1428 nel Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, John Gifford, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Ugworthy, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Joan Spencer. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 13 aprile 1483, nel Sutcombe, Devon, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stephen Giffordが約1428年にイギリスハンプシュアイアイトチェン アッバスで生まれた時，父John Giffordは24歳，母Alice Ugworthyは30歳であった。Joan Spencerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年4月13日にイギリスデボンストコンベで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Gifford(이)가 대략 1428년 영국 함프실르 잇친 애브바스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Gifford(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Ugworthy(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Joan Spencer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 4월 13일 영국 데폰 수트코브에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Sutcombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom: Sutcombe, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Gifford nasceu aproximadamente 1428, em Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Gifford, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Ugworthy, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Spencer. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 13 de abril de 1483, em Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Gifford родился около 1428 г. в местности ичэн эббас, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Gifford было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Ugworthy, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Spencer. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 13 апреля 1483 г. в местности суткомб, девон, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen Gifford nació aproximadamente 1428, en Itchen Abbas, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Gifford, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Ugworthy, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Joan Spencer. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 13 de abril de 1483, en Sutcombe, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
